posts.author: Equitypandit
posts.text: Antony Waste Shares Slip After Fatal Pune Facility Incident

posts.author: Ketan_Chheda
posts.community: Antony Waste - Long Term Best or Waste?
posts.text: Hi, There is a possiblity that total revenues could cross 1500Cr in FY28, based on continuing of existing contracts and additions of new contracts, some estimates below: 70% of Contract & Others continiung (from sweeping contracts, RDF & Compost sales, etc) C&D scale up New BMC C&T contracts fully scaled up New Thane processing fully scaled up New AP WTE Contract revenue And current valuation appear to me very modest. There is a chance of valuation re-rating happening, especially, when the sales numbers will start showing good growth. I reckon that there is a potential of making about 1.7x-2x…
